mixenergy.config.title: MixEnergy Settings
mixenergy.config.subtitle.multiplayer: Interface preferences; gameplay rules are server-controlled
mixenergy.config.position.description: Choose where the energy bar appears on screen
mixenergy.config.source.sprinting.descri: Continuously consumes energy while sprinting on land
mixenergy.config.source.swimming.descrip: Continuously consumes energy while fast-swimming underwater
mixenergy.config.source.breaking.descrip: Consumes energy after successfully breaking a block
mixenergy.config.source.placing.descript: Consumes energy when placing a block
mixenergy.config.source.attacks.descript: Consumes energy when attacking an entity
mixenergy.config.server.description: These rules are set by the server in config/mixenergy-common.toml
mixenergy.config.server.tooltip: This setting is available in single-player or in the server config file
